title: SHIFT: Break Pattern, Build Perspective
description: Exhibited My Father's Daughter (2024) and EVE (2022).
longDescription: Group exhibition at Printed in Colour, London. Chelsea exhibited My Father's Daughter (2024) and EVE (2022), continuing her exploration of memory, perspective, and identity through figurative and symbolic painting.

title: Round the Fire Stories
description: Curated by Curtis Donovan. Exhibited True 2 Self.
longDescription: Exhibition at FirePit Gallery, London, curated by Curtis Donovan. Chelsea exhibited True 2 Self, contributing to a wider narrative-led programme focused on contemporary personal storytelling through art.

title: Painting Open
description: Exhibited What the Heart Wants (2023), sold for £333.
longDescription: Selected for Painting Open 2023 at No Format Gallery, London. Chelsea exhibited What the Heart Wants (2023), which sold during the show for £333.

title: Painting Open
description: Exhibited Waiting for My Love to Come Home (2022).
longDescription: Selected for Painting Open 2022 at No Format Gallery, London. Chelsea exhibited Waiting for My Love to Come Home (2022), an early piece in her evolving narrative-centered painting practice.

title: Black History Month Sip and Paint: Reclaiming Narratives
description: Led creative workshop during Black History Month programming.
longDescription: Artist-led workshop hosted with Burson Roots. The session focused on reclaiming narratives through painting, helping participants explore identity and personal storytelling through guided visual prompts.

title: Black History Month Sip and Paint: Reclaiming Narratives
description: Burson Roots workshop on storytelling, identity, and visual expression.
longDescription: Black History Month workshop delivered in collaboration with Burson Roots. Participants engaged in reflective painting exercises centered on memory, identity, and visual narrative making.

title: Sip and Paint Workshop
description: Interactive painting workshop hosted in Ghana.
longDescription: A community-focused Sip and Paint session at Republic Bar and Grill in Ghana, combining practical painting prompts with social connection and creative confidence-building.
